title: gochnatia hypoleuca subsp. obtusata
intro: Gochnatia hypoleuca subsp. obtusata is a plant species that is part of the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is a shrub native to South America, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Gochnatia hypoleuca subsp. obtusata include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which have been used to treat a range of ailments.
